content: Connections via PC email clients is not the same route as via the web browser. All thunderbird can do is send a request through network for a connection. It is then on the spectrum server to respond. You might try reducing number of connections to the server. This is a network issue, not a thunderbird one. And, that it is happening on two laptops, plus a desktop confirms that the issue is separate.
creator: davidsk
